data.title: Musk: A major Grok update will be released on the evening of February 25
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk announced on the X platform that a major update to the Grok voice mode will be launched tomorrow night (February 25). (Jinshi)

data.title: pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days surpassed Tron and ranked third
data.description: According to DeFiLlama data, pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days reached 14.76 million US dollars, and Tron's revenue in the past 7 days reached 11.42 million US dollars. Pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days has surpassed Tron and ranked third.

data.title: Canary is suspected of submitting HBAR ETF application
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: anary is suspected of cooperating with Nasdaq to submit an application for HBAR ETF (Equation News).

data.title: Only 44% of Bitcoin ETF Inflows Are Long-Term Investments, According to Research
data.description:
TL;DR 10x Research reveals only 44% of U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF inflows are intended for long-term investments, with the remaining 56% driven by short-term trading strategies like arbitrage. Arbitrage strategies dominate inflows, with investors profiting from price discrepancies between spot Bitcoin and Bitcoin futures. Market sentiment is impacted as hedge funds and trading firms, the ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/only-44-of-bitcoin-etf-inflows-are-long-term-investments-according-to-research/

data.title: Neobank Infini celebrates $50M TVL, then suffers $49.5M USDC exploit due to former insider
data.description:
Infini, a stablecoin-focused neo-bank, suffered an exploit that resulted in a loss of approximately $49.5 million in USDC. Blockchain security firm Cyvers detected the breach less than a day after the platform celebrated reaching a $50 million total value locked (TVL) milestone. Blockchain analytics firm Lookonchain reported that the attacker swiftly converted the stolen USDC […]
The post...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/neobank-infini-celebrates-50m-tvl-then-suffers-49-5m-exploit-due-to-former-insider/

data.title: Insider: Ethena previously completed $100 million in financing in December
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethena has now raised $100 million through a private placement of ENA tokens to fund the launch of similar tokens for traditional financial institutions. According to a person familiar with the matter, the financing, which has not been reported before, was completed in December and attracted investors including Franklin Templeton and F-Prime Capital, a venture capital firm under Fidelity Investments. (bloomberglaw)

data.title: Infini suffers $50M hack, days after Bybit’s $1.5Bn exploit
data.description:
Infini’s exploit follows the Bybit hack that resulted in the loss of $1.5 billion last week Infini’s attacker had previously worked on the project’s development contract and secretly retained the admin rights Christian Li said full compensation can be paid and that the funds were being traced Infini, a stablecoin neobank, reportedly suffered an exploit […]
